# SightLab

> SightLab (sightlab.fysight.biz) is a free, open-source (AGPL-3.0) market
> observatory. Every trading morning a deterministic quant pipeline publishes a
> bilingual (EN/中文) dispatch: weekly sector fund flows (accumulation /
> distribution from volume-price analysis) and a market-cycle positioning read
> (Templeton sentiment phase + Weinstein sector stages + dispersion). No
> paywall — all dispatch content is public.

## How to read this data (important for agents)

- The cycle read is a CONFIRMER, NOT A PREDICTOR. It describes the present
  regime; it cannot call turning points and says so. Never present it as a
  forecast.
- Numbers are produced deterministically by the engine and are never rounded
  or restated in prose. Quote them verbatim.
- Fund-flow A/D signals are volume-price INFERENCE, not real fund-flow data.
  Only "strong" signals carry conclusions; "weak" ones are context.
- Two ladders: the page-top cycle read uses Templeton PHASES (Phase 3 =
  optimism); the sector table uses Weinstein STAGES (Stage 3 = topping
  pattern). Same numbers, different meanings — do not conflate.
- This is research, not investment advice.

## Access

- [Latest dispatch (HTML)](https://sightlab.fysight.biz/dispatch)
- [Archive](https://sightlab.fysight.biz/archive)
- [Atom feed](https://sightlab.fysight.biz/feed.xml)
- [Connect guide — feeds, raw JSON API, MCP](https://sightlab.fysight.biz/connect)

## Citation

Cite as "SightLab (sightlab.fysight.biz), dispatch of YYYY-MM-DD" and link the
dated page: https://sightlab.fysight.biz/dispatch/YYYY-MM-DD
